subject: WarpTools fail to reconstruct tomograms (Tutorial and own data)
body:
Hi,

**1. GPU setup:** The nodes are using NVIDIA A40 GPUs. CUDA version is 11.6

nvcc: NVIDIA (R) Cuda compiler driver
Copyright (c) 2005-2022 NVIDIA Corporation
Built on Thu_Feb_10_18:23:41_PST_2022
Cuda compilation tools, release 11.6, V11.6.112
Build cuda_11.6.r11.6/compiler.30978841_0

Nvidia-driver: NVIDIA-SMI 595.58.03              Driver Version: 595.58.03

**2. ts_etomo_patches output:** There were no warnings or error messages.

This is the full console output including the command used (run with warp v36):

WarpTools ts_etomo_patches --settings warp_tiltseries.settings --angpix 10 --patch_size 500 --initial_axis -85.6
Running command ts_etomo_patches with:
angpix = 10
mask = False
min_fov = 0
initial_axis = -85,6
do_axis_search = False
patch_size = 500
delete_intermediate = False
thumbnails = False
device_list = {  }
perdevice = 1
workers = {  }
settings = warp_tiltseries.settings
input_data = {  }
input_data_recursive = False
input_processing = null
output_processing = null
input_norawdata = False
strict = False

No alternative input specified, will use input parameters from warp_tiltseries.settings
File search will be relative to /gpfs/bwfor/work/ws/hd_df123-WS1/warp-tutorial/tomostar
5 files found
Parsing previous results for each item, if available...
5/5, previous metadata found for 0
Connecting to workers...
Connected to 1 workers
Performing patch tracking alignment on all tilt-series...
5/5, 00:00 remaining
Finished processing in 00:06:47
Saying goodbye to all workers... Done

**3. IMOD alignment import:** Yes, the folder warp_tiltseries/tiltstack/ contained sub-folders named after each tilt series, including the .xf and .tlt files.

**4. IMOD version:** The IMOD version on the cluster is 5.1.2 . For generating the stand-alone alignments that were imported to warp, a local computer running the newest version of IMOD was used.

Best,

Helge
